strengths: ~20 years of continuous engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, comfortably clearing the 15-year minimum
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates platform-building ownership and entrepreneurial initiative within a resource-constrained environment
Consistent knowledge-sharing through conference talks and multi-day workshops shows some external influence and communication capability
concerns: AI expertise is superficial — current role mentions MCP tooling and agentic workflow support, but no demonstrated AI product ownership, ML system design, or recognized AI thought leadership
Has never operated at director-level IC seniority; all documented roles cap at staff or senior individual contributor with no strategic customer advisory or cross-organizational influence
No graduate education in AI or related fields, and cloud architecture experience is limited to incidental AWS CDK usage in one role — far below the depth this position requires
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable, broad-stack engineer with two decades of hands-on experience, but this role demands director-level AI strategy leadership — advising strategic customers, shaping cloud AI roadmaps, and holding recognized expertise backed by demonstrated AI products or platforms. His AI exposure is limited to a brief mention of MCP tooling integrations at his current employer, with no evidence of ML system design, AI platform ownership, or external AI thought leadership. Every documented role sits at senior or staff IC level, and there is no indication of executive-facing advisory work, cross-org influence, or the kind of organizational reach a principal at this seniority is expected to have. The GISCollective founding is a mild positive signal on the entrepreneurial axis but does not close the gap.
